parties.name: LIU, QIWEN 11 BENDEN STREET. #601 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Qiwen Liu present in pro per for the minors: Linda Lee and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Linda Liu.
Decree signed in open court.
